headline_seed: US seeks indictment of former Cuban leader Raul Castro - Al Jazeera
draft_text:
The U.S. is moving to indict Raúl Castro, 94, over the 1996 shootdown of two Brothers to the Rescue planes. CIA Director Ratcliffe led a delegation to Havana on Thursday, USA Today and Al Jazeera English report.

And that's the mews.
